summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-language features for LearnHub platform. All backend APIs and frontend UI language switching functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ API /api/languages returns all 5 supported languages (en, zh-TW, zh-CN, ja, ko)
✅ Course creation with language field validation works
✅ Search functionality works with both English and Chinese text
✅ UI language switcher in header switches between English and Traditional Chinese
✅ Landing page text changes correctly when switching languages
✅ Course language filter dropdown on courses page works
✅ Course cards display language badges with Globe icon
✅ Course creation form includes language selection field
✅ Invalid language validation rejects unsupported languages
✅ Admin authentication and course management works
✅ Student registration, login and enrollment works
✅ All API endpoints return correct status codes
